hero.headline: Tampa Pool Care Done With Precision
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves more than a guy with a net. Precision Pools delivers CPO-certified, owner-operated service that keeps your water crystal clear and your weekends free. Founded right here in Tampa, we treat every pool like it's our own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care Backed by<br class="hidden md:block"> Real Expertise
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to storm recovery, our CPO-certified team handles every aspect of pool care so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning and chemical balancing to keep your pool crystal clear. We handle skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and water testing on a reliable schedule you can count on.

cards.title: Full-Service Pool Care
cards.description: Complete pool maintenance beyond basic cleaning — equipment inspections, filter cleaning, chemical management, and water balancing to ensure optimal pool health year-round.

cards.title: After-Storm Cleanup
cards.description: Rapid response pool cleanup after Florida storms. We remove debris, rebalance chemicals, inspect equipment for damage, and restore your pool to pristine condition fast.

cards.title: Commercial Pools
cards.description: Professional-grade maintenance for hotels, apartments, and community pools. We ensure health code compliance and keep your facility looking its absolute best.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and other essential equipment. We keep your pool system running smoothly and efficiently — most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Service
cards.description: Specialized cleaning and maintenance for hot tubs and spas, including water chemistry management, filter cleaning, and equipment inspection for a safe, relaxing soak.

steps.title: Request Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll provide an honest, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just straightforward pricing.

steps.title: We Show Up & Deliver
steps.description: Our CPO-certified, background-checked technicians arrive on schedule every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — handled with precision, down to every detail.

steps.title: Enjoy a Sparkling Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready and worry-free all year. If you're ever not satisfied, we come back and make it right at no charge. That's the Precision Pools promise.

about.label: Why Tampa Trusts Precision Pools
about.headline: Owner-Operated, CPO-Certified, and All-In on Your Pool
about.description: Founded in 2022 by Griffin Shahmanesh right here in Tampa, Precision Pools was built on one belief: pool owners deserve better. What started as a one-man operation has grown into Tampa's top-rated pool service — earning a 4.9-star reputation through hands-on care, certified expertise, and treating every single pool like it's our own.

features.title: Background-Checked Technicians
features.description: Every member of our crew passes a thorough background check before ever stepping foot in your backyard. Your safety comes first.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises. Period.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. Griffin personally ensures every client is taken care of.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back and redo it completely free. No questions asked, no fine print. Griffin personally stands behind every visit because your trust is how we've built our reputation — one pool at a time.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For post-storm emergencies, we offer rapid response. Just call Griffin directly and we'll work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Tampa clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll receive a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team is CPO-certified (Certified Pool Operator) and every technician passes a comprehensive background check. We carry full liability insurance for your complete peace of mind.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no cancellation penalties, no hassle. We believe in earning your business every single visit — that's why our clients stick around.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for hotels, apartment complexes, HOAs, and community facilities across Tampa. Commercial clients get dedicated service schedules and health code compliance.

testimonials.name: Gilberto G.
testimonials.text: Highly recommend Griffin and his team for any of your pool service needs. Extremely professional and top notch customer service.

testimonials.name: WJS
testimonials.text: I am really impressed with Precision Pools. Griffin is reliable, polite and efficient. He is very accommodating and pays attention to detail. I would highly recommend him.

testimonials.name: Brianna P.
testimonials.text: Extremely professional and great work! Would highly recommend Precision Pool and Lawncare to anyone who is in need of expert lawn or pool services!
